subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The letter from his honour Farajullah - upon him be My glory - which he wrote unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه جناب فرج الله علیه بهائی که بانجناب نوشته
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
